briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Define QueryParameters — a dataclass-based FastAPI Form model that captures all dedoc API query parameters for document parsing configuration.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Scope\/ \: API request parameter parsing — document type, structure options, PDF handling, table analysis, attachments, etc. \par \b Input\/ \: FastAPI Form fields from HTTP request. \par \b Output\/ \: QueryParameters instance with typed fields and to_dict() serialization. \par \b Links\/ \: [USES_API(8): fastapi.Form; USES_API(6): dataclasses.asdict] \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: All Form fields have defaults (no required parameters at this level).
to_dict() always returns a flat dict with parameter_name -> default_value. \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why dataclass with Form() instead of Pydantic BaseModel? A: FastAPI's Form() with dataclass provides direct mapping from multipart form data and enum validation without Pydantic overhead. Fields use string enums for request validation. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 – Initial creation with semantic markup] \par \b Module Map\/ \:
CLASS 8[API query parameters as Form dataclass] => QueryParameters METHOD 5[Serializes dataclass to flat dict] => to_dict \par \b Use Cases\/ \:
